name: Libravatar Avatars
author: Bulwark Mail Community
description: Resolves Libravatar profile pictures for email contacts via the avatar transform hook. Libravatar is a federated, privacy-friendly Gravatar alternative.

size.label: Image size (px)
size.description: Size of the Libravatar image in pixels (16-512)

defaultStyle.label: Fallback style
defaultStyle.description: Image style when an email has no Libravatar profile. '404' lets the host show its own fallback (initials / favicon).
